cards.title: How Kids' Creativity Thrives With Parenthood
cards.body: A parent discovers that having children unexpectedly enhanced rather than hindered creative expression. Everyday moments with a four-year-old—like imagining kale as giraffes—reveal how children offer fresh perspectives.

cards.title: Maternal Mental Health Now a Formal Specialty
cards.body: Reproductive psychiatry is being established as a formal subspecialty to better support mothers. This ensures women receive evidence-based guidance during critical perinatal periods.

cards.title: Summer Stress: Why Kids Lose School Structure
cards.body: The lack of school-year structure can quietly trigger anxiety in children and teens during summer. Understanding this pattern helps parents better support kids through unscheduled time.

cards.title: Postpartum Bodies Need Neutral Support, Not Pressure
cards.body: New mothers face intense pressure to 'bounce back' to pre-pregnancy bodies after birth. A body-neutral approach helps postpartum women focus on genuine self-care instead.

cards.title: Competition Helps Children Learn and Develop
cards.body: Ratings and rankings, though controversial, have always been integral to child development and social growth. Competition teaches children valuable lessons about motivation and personal growth.

cards.title: Building Friendships: Skills Kids Need Now
cards.body: Children need compromise, adaptability, and resilience to make strong friendships. Summer offers natural opportunities to help kids strengthen these essential social skills.

cards.title: Breaking Family Cycles Starts With Truth
cards.body: Family dysfunction persists through repeated stories, half-truths, and silence across generations. Healing begins when families stop protecting lies and start speaking openly about patterns.

cards.title: Social Media Curfew Proposed for UK Teens
cards.body: A midnight social media curfew has been proposed for older UK teenagers as part of new regulations. Teens can opt out, though campaigners argue the restrictions are incomplete.
